info.title: Streaming Response
info.description:
This document describes the streaming response mode of the image generation API, compatible with BytePlus ModelArk upstream SSE protocol.

When streaming is enabled (`stream: true`), the server pushes each image generation result in real-time via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

Only `seedream-5-0-lite`, `seedream-4-5`, and `seedream-4-0` support streaming responses.

post.description:
When streaming is enabled, the request is identical to the normal image creation API (same path, method, and request body format). Simply set `stream: true` in the request body and set the `Accept` header to `text/event-stream` on the client side.

The server pushes each generation result via SSE protocol: an `image_generation.partial_succeeded` event is pushed each time an image is generated; an `image_generation.completed` event is pushed when all images are finished.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Client must set this header to `text/event-stream` to receive SSE stream.

value.prompt: A set of four seasons landscape illustrations
A cute corgi running on a grassy field

200.description:
SSE streaming response. Content type is `text/event-stream`. Contains the following events:

### Event Types

| Event Name | Trigger | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `image_generation.partial_succeeded` | Each time an image is generated | Pushes a single image's generation result |
| `image_generation.completed` | All images finished | Pushes usage info, marks end of stream |

### image_generation.partial_succeeded Event

Data format:

```json
{
  "url": "https://...",
  "size": "2048x2048",
  "image_index": 0
}
```

- `url`: Image download URL, valid for 24 hours
- `size`: Image dimensions in pixels
- `image_index`: Index of the image in the batch (starting from 0)

### image_generation.completed Event

Data format:

```json
{
  "usage": {
    "generated_images": 4,
    "output_tokens": 16384,
    "total_tokens": 16384
  }
}
```

After receiving this event, the stream has ended and the client should disconnect.

schema.description: SSE stream text. Each line starts with `event:` or `data:`, events are separated by blank lines.

error.message: Invalid request body format or illegal field value

BearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

model.description: Image generation model ID. Only `seedream-5-0-lite`, `seedream-4-5`, and `seedream-4-0` support streaming output.

stream.description: Streaming switch. Must be set to `true` to enable SSE streaming.
